items.title: Assessing Caterpillar (CAT) Valuation After Strong Share Price Gains in 2024
items.description: Caterpillar (CAT) shares have seen some movement lately, catching the attention of investors who are tracking the stock’s performance over the past month and quarter. The company’s recent returns tell an interesting story as investors evaluate its outlook. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar.
